home.tagline: Break through machine legions on a wide planet and survive.
home.taglineSub: Hold the line for 15 minutes with automatic firepower.
home.hintCaption: HUD tone: threat sense · survival timer

hud.supplyHint: High-ground supply — press 1 · 2 · 3 to choose one card

audio.title: Audio settings
audio.desc: Adjust BGM/SFX volume and mute. Settings are saved on this device.

shop.title: Hangar
shop.subHtml: Choose chassis · missile color · favored cards and deploy the mission.
shop.secMechDesc: Starting stats differ. Hypersuit, Azonas V, and Geren use different procedural evolution meshes. Skinned GLB chassis (Expressive, Soldier, and five local /models/*.glb picks) load rigged models + the same per-form attach evolution as in combat. Expressive/Soldier keep CDN fallbacks; others use only local files.
shop.secSkinDesc: Only the player missile Projectile material color changes.
shop.secCardsDesc: Up to {max} cards. Weights increase in the getRandomCards pool.
shop.sideEvoShort: Use the left panel for the level→Form table and nine-step silhouettes.
shop.evoLeadSkinnedHtml: {name} uses a rigged GLTF with material grading; arms, legs, head attachment modules, back boosters, and wings grow by level/Form. Soldier uses three.js Idle / Walk / Run clips. Other chassis use different procedural mesh pipelines.
shop.evoLeadProcHtml: Each chassis stacks Forms through a distinct 3D pipeline (box / triangle / round). The Form 0–8 columns below match the label order.
shop.previewCaptionSkinnedHtml: Form {form} · GLTF + attach modules · boosters · wings · animation preview
shop.previewCaptionProcHtml: Form {form} · chassis-specific mesh (box/triangle/circle) · evolves 0–8 by level

rank.title: Run rankings
rank.sub: Runs are saved on game over. Up to 2000 records are kept.
rank.emptyPodium: No records yet. Finish a run to see entries here.

hypersuit.name: Hypersuit
hypersuit.blurb: Solid HP and defense. Best for steady, forgiving runs.

azonas-v.name: Azonas V
azonas-v.blurb: High speed and damage. When you want mobility and DPS.

geren.name: Geren
geren.blurb: Top HP and defense. Strong in boss fights and brawls.

expressive.name: Expressive
expressive.blurb: Rigged GLB. Level/Form shift color, emissive, and PBR; no extra geometry bolted on. Combat uses this GLTF when selected.

soldier.name: Soldier
soldier.blurb: three.js sample Soldier.glb — Idle/Walk/Run skeletal blend. Same GLB loads in combat.

cyberpunk-human.name: Cyberpunk Human
cyberpunk-human.blurb: `cyberpunk_human.glb` — Idle/Walk/Run matched from clip names when available.

neon-human.name: Neon Human
neon-human.blurb: `neon_human.glb` — mobility-tuned stats; material evolution only (no attach meshes).
